Name: Courtney Browning
Summary: Dedicated System Administrator with 3+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.
Skills: Python, JavaScript, SQL, Git, Docker, AWS, Linux, Agile
Experience: Lead System Administrator at GitHub (2020 - 2024): Developed and maintained 17 production applications serving 242K+ users; Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%. Lead System Administrator at Oracle (2014 - 2017): Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 37%; Mentored 5 junior developers and conducted code reviews. Senior System Administrator at Google (2004 - 2008): Improved system performance by 63% through optimization techniques; Led a team of 8 engineers to deliver critical projects on schedule.
Education: Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering from University of Wisconsin, 2018, GPA: 3.58

Courtney Browning
courtney.browning@gmail.com | +1-259-792-8553x5952 | Joneston, MT

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Dedicated System Administrator with 3+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.

• Led a team of 8 engineers to deliver critical projects on schedule

Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering, University of Wisconsin (2018)
GPA: 3.58

Name: Luke Estrada
Summary: Dedicated Mobile Developer with 3+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.
Skills: SQL, Java, REST API, Firebase, React Native, Linux, Agile, Kotlin, Xcode, Swift, Git, Flutter
Experience: Senior Mobile Developer at IBM (2020 - 2024): Improved system performance by 55% through optimization techniques; Developed and maintained 11 production applications serving 86K+ users. Senior Mobile Developer at NVIDIA (2014 - 2017): Developed and maintained 13 production applications serving 329K+ users; Mentored 6 junior developers and conducted code reviews. Principal Mobile Developer at SpaceX (2008 - 2010): Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 47%; Developed and maintained 19 production applications serving 466K+ users.
Education: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology from University of Texas at Austin, 2010, GPA: 3.7
Text:
Luke Estrada
luke.estrada@gmail.com | 469.914.9611 | Laceychester, OH

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Dedicated Mobile Developer with 3+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.

• Developed and maintained 11 production applications serving 86K+ users

• Developed and maintained 19 production applications serving 466K+ users

Name: Gregory Phillips
Summary: Dedicated Mobile Developer with 8+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.
Skills: SQL, Android Studio, Git, Swift, Java, React Native, REST API, Xcode, Kotlin, Linux, Flutter, Firebase
Experience: Senior Mobile Developer at Airbnb (2021 - 2024): Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 34%; Developed and maintained 17 production applications serving 227K+ users. Lead Mobile Developer at Google (2014 - 2018): Mentored 2 junior developers and conducted code reviews; Developed and maintained 10 production applications serving 376K+ users.
Education: Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering from UC Berkeley, 2011, GPA: 3.99
Text:
Gregory Phillips
gregory.phillips@yahoo.com | (677)346-2591x60112 | West Reneehaven, GU

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Dedicated Mobile Developer with 8+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
SQL, Android Studio, Git, Swift, Java, React Native, REST API, Xcode, Kotlin, Linux, Flutter, Firebase

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Senior Mobile Developer - Airbnb (2021 - 2024)
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 34%
• Developed and maintained 17 production applications serving 227K+ users
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver 4 major features
• Mentored 6 junior developers and conducted code reviews

Lead Mobile Developer - Google (2014 - 2018)
• Mentored 2 junior developers and conducted code reviews
• Developed and maintained 10 production applications serving 376K+ users
• Improved system performance by 76% through optimization techniques
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver 11 major features

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering, UC Berkeley (2011)
GPA: 3.99

CERTIFICATIONS
Google Analytics Certified, PMP Certification
